mapper.select: SELECT id, house_id, item_group, item_code, item_name, standard_id, start_date, expire_date, last_date, money, standard_price, is_charged FROM pr_expense WHERE house_id = #{houseId} AND item_group = '6' AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY start_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT house_id FROM pr_expense WHERE item_group = #{itemGroup} AND item_code = #{itemCode} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE pr_expense SET standard_price = standard_price WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND org_id = #{orgId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE pr_expense SET money = money WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND org_id = #{orgId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE pr_expense SET receivable = money WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND org_id = #{orgId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE pr_expense SET receivable = money WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND org_id = #{orgId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE pr_house SET is_calc = '1' WHERE id = #{houseId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, item_code, item_group, cycles, generate_rule, step_type, statistics_type, step_maxgrade, is_step2, step2_type, step2_maxgrade, is_latefee, latefee_startdate, latefee_type, latefee_startdays, latefee_formula, is_limited, limited_type, limited_cond, limited_times, limited_money, limited_single_money, standard_price, money_formula, max_money, org_id, company_id FROM pr_standard WHERE id = #{standardId}
